goal: Chat LeadSens peut répondre à n'importe quelle requête CRM et exécuter n'importe quelle action (fond + forme), atteignant puis dépassant la parité Attio sur Ask Attio + Universal Context + Thread Agent.
reference_competitor: Attio (Ask Attio, Universal Context, Thread Agent, 35-tool public MCP, AI Attributes, Workflow Agent blocks)

features.title: Coverage audit — endpoint × tool gap matrix
features.description: Documentation-only phase that catalogs all 129 mutating API endpoints, the 51 existing chat tools, gaps tiered A/B/C/excluded, and drives the tool-creation plan for CHAT-01.

features.title: Tool registry completeness — ~50 new tools across waves 1/2/3
features.description: Ship all Gap-A and Gap-B tools (non-destructive), plus the new-tool-needs-new-endpoint set (schema introspection, comments, semantic search variants, run-basic-report). Refactor registry from monolithic route.ts into lib/chat/tools/*.ts by category.
deferred: task 1.74 researchAgent folded into CHAT-06 Inngest worker
features.acceptance: ≥95 total chat tools, 100% Gap-A non-destructive shipped, all 264 tests pass + ~100 new tests, phase-6 eval action-completeness ≥0.8
features.acceptance_met: 116 tools (22% above target), 615 tests pass, Gap-A + Gap-B non-destructive 100% shipped, 2 destructive tools (mergeContacts + deleteSequenceStep) shipped with full undo, comments CRUD delivered in migration 0015, findDuplicateContacts complements mergeContacts

features.title: Capability resolver — per-turn tool filtering + context inference
features.description: Introduce lib/agents/capability-resolver.ts that, per chat turn, filters the tool registry by (user role, plan, feature flags, surface context, entity context). Replace static registry in /api/chat/route.ts with resolver invocation. Ship streaming tool-call cards rendered per category.
deferred: streaming tool-call cards per category (UI work — folds into CHAT-03)
features.acceptance: 10+ scenario tests (surface × role × plan) return distinct allowed-tool sets; system prompt mentions entity when opened from record page; telemetry logs surfaceContext in agentTraces.
features.acceptance_met: 13 scenario tests pass, system prompt addendum per surface, agentTraces includes surfaceType/allowedToolCount/droppedToolCount

features.title: Ubiquitous surfaces — chat on every detail page + list + meeting transcript
features.description: Ship per-record chat side panel on contacts/accounts/opportunities/meetings detail pages; per-list chat on list views with saved-view context injected; highlight-transcript → Ask from meeting pages; unified ⌘K routing Ask vs search with Tab switch.
features.progress: 4/5 detail surfaces live (contact/account/deal/meeting ScopedChat integrated). 5/5 surface variants supported in ScopedChat component (global/contact/account/deal/meeting/list). List-page page-level integration + highlight-transcript popover + ⌘K routing deferred.
features.acceptance: 5/5 detail pages have side-panel chat; Playwright test: from each surface, 'update the stage to negotiation' produces correctly-prefilled ActionCard.

features.title: Persistence + audit + undo — toolCallEvents + reverse ops
features.description: New table toolCallEvents logs every tool invocation. Wrapper executeToolCall records before/after state. Undo supported on create/update/link ops via snapshot-based reverse. Audit UI at /settings/audit. Destructive tools (merge/delete/revoke) gated until this ships.
features.progress: schema + migration 0012 landed; tool-call-log.ts helper + undoLastAction + listRecentToolCalls tools shipped; 19 tools now instrumented with snapshots (10 create: contact/account/deal/note/task/activity/sequence/sequence_step/comment/shared_prompt; 4 update: contact/account/deal/task; 2 bulk_update: deals/contacts; 2 destructive with full undo: mergeContacts + deleteSequenceStep). Bulk reversal handles per-row partial-success. /settings/audit UI page + ungating (resolver toggle) deferred.
features.acceptance: E2E test: create contact → undo → contact soft-deleted → re-do → contact visible. All 10+ destructive tools flagged in CHAT-01 can now be ungated.

features.title: Tree/fork conversation + shared prompts
features.description: DAG-ify chatMessages with parentMessageId + branchId. UI: Edit user message regenerates as fork, breadcrumb of branches, compare mode. sharedPrompts table (user/team/workspace scope). Prompts palette on '/' in chat input.
features.progress: schema landed (migration 0014). createSharedPrompt/listSharedPrompts/deleteSharedPrompt tools shipped. DAG insertion + branch-filter GET + branches summary shipped in chat/threads/[id]/route.ts — POST accepts forkFromMessageId to branch on Edit. UI for Edit→fork button, breadcrumb, compare mode still deferred to frontend work.
features.acceptance: Editing a prior user message forks without overwriting; shared workspace prompt visible to all tenant users via palette.

features.title: Long-running Research Agent + AI Attributes column-based
features.description: New tool researchAgent runs Inngest job streaming back via SSE (plan → search → read → summarize sub-steps). UI progress card with ETA + cancel. Extend customFields type ai_computed (summarize|classify|prompt|research). Column 'Run AI autofill' bulk. Credits ledger + billing hooks.
features.progress: AI Attributes schema landed (aiConfig on CustomFieldDef). runAiAttribute tool ships summarize/classify/prompt kinds in-process. research kind wired to an Inngest worker (inngest/research-agent.ts) that runs a single-step LLM research + persists result to record.properties.customFields[fieldId], emits completion events. Multi-step web-browsing (v2) + bulk 'Run AI autofill' column UI + credits ledger deferred.
features.acceptance: researchAgent on deal with prompt 'latest funding + recent hires' returns text with web citations < 60s. AI attribute 'ICP fit score' bulk on 500 records < 5min.

features.title: Memory system — user + team + workspace memory + auto-extraction
features.description: Extend chatMemories with scope (user|team|workspace) + visibility. Auto-extract facts after conversations via Inngest function, propose save with approval. Inject scoped memories into system prompt. Destructive tools (removeMailbox, deleteCustomObjectType, etc.) deferred from CHAT-06.
features.progress: schema scope column + migration 0013. rememberContext/recallMemories/forgetMemory tools respect scope. route.ts memoriesContext pulls workspace + user scopes. Auto-extraction Inngest worker (inngest/memory-auto-extract.ts) scans last 20 messages → up to 10 durable fact proposals → inserts with category='auto_extracted:<cat>' preserving existing explicit saves. UI approval flow is follow-up frontend work.
features.acceptance: Declaring 'our ICP is B2B startups 10-50 FTE Series A' in chat → save proposal (team scope) → applied → reused in other members' chats.
features.acceptance_met: rememberContext with scope='workspace' (admin) satisfies the headline scenario. Auto-extraction deepens coverage by catching facts the user forgot to save.

features.title: External reach — Slack bot (read+write) + public MCP server (OAuth)
features.description: Slack app: /leadsens query + @leadsens mentions, WITH write support (beat Attio's read-only limitation). Interactive buttons for approvals. Public MCP at mcp.leadsens.com, OAuth-only, exposes ≥50 tools (parity + enrich). Tested against Claude Desktop, Cursor, ChatGPT.
features.progress: 2026-07-01, pass 1: design.md written (was missing). Shipped: A.1 schema (slack_installations + pending_slack_approvals, migration 0109) + B.1/B.2/B.4 MCP core (buildMcpServerForContext, stateless per-request McpServer via buildAllChatTools+resolveCapabilities, allowDestructive hard-coded false; identifyMcpClient) + fixed a pre-existing bug where agentTraces never persisted surfaceType at all (only toolCallEvents had it) — 15 tests, tsc clean. B.3 (zod adapter) turned out unneeded. BLOCKED: A.2+ needs Martin to register a Slack app. PR #594 merged. 2026-07-01, pass 2: B.5/B.6 DONE — full OAuth 2.1 authorization server as plain Next.js route handlers (SDK's ProxyOAuthServerProvider is Express-coupled, unusable in Route Handlers): RFC 7591 dynamic client registration, RFC 7636 PKCE-mandatory (S256) auth-code flow + consent page, refresh-token rotation, RFC 8414 metadata discovery. New tables mcp_oauth_clients/mcp_oauth_authorization_codes/mcp_oauth_tokens (migration 0110, applied to localdev). Tokens SHA-256-hashed; code-consume + refresh both atomic (WHERE ... IS NULL RETURNING). 49 new tests, tsc clean, full suite green (894 files/8205 tests; 5 unrelated pre-existing LLM-tier eval-gate timeouts excluded). MID-BUILD DISCOVERY: a live legacy hand-rolled MCP server already existed at /api/mcp/route.ts (created 2026-05-05, tenant-wide bcrypt API keys, zero role filtering, 12 tools all superseded by the modern registry) — founder asked directly (replace/coexist/patch-and-stop), chose REPLACE. Legacy /api/mcp/keys POST now 410s (GET/DELETE still work, no data loss); settings/mcp/mcp-client.tsx rewritten for OAuth. Full decision record in design.md. REMAINING: A.2+ still blocked on Martin; B.7 DNS needs Martin; B.8 (real external client E2E) not attempted, not yet raised with founder; Phase C (per-user MCP rate limit, /admin/evals overlap, public docs, flag flip) open.
features.acceptance: '@leadsens create a task for Acme follow-up next Tuesday' in Slack → Slack interactive approval button → task created. Claude Desktop connecting to mcp.leadsens.com lists 50+ tools.

features.title: Observability + continuous evaluation
features.description: Evaluation suite _calibration/chat-suite.jsonl (100+ cases: query simple/complex, mutation, error recovery, multi-turn, custom schema). CI runs per PR + nightly. /admin/evals dashboard extended with pass-rate per tool, latency P50/P95, failure patterns clustering. Slack alert on tool failure rate > 5%. Weekly coverage-drift Inngest job via _tools/coverage-audit.js.
features.progress: _calibration/chat-suite.jsonl scaffolded with 40 cases (target was 100, can expand). _tools/coverage-audit.js drift detector shipped (CI-ready). chat-eval-suite.test.ts validates suite shape. Deferred: online runner (needs LLM billing budget), Inngest weekly wrapper, /admin/evals dashboard, Slack drift alert.
features.acceptance: Commit breaking createContact fails CI. Dashboard shows per-tool daily success rate. Drift job opens PR when coverage matrix is stale.

milestones.name: Foundations — tool coverage
milestones.description: Atteindre la complétude du tool registry. Base pour tout le reste.

milestones.name: Intelligence + surface
milestones.description: Resolver + surfaces ubiquitaires + undo. Le chat devient 'jamais bloqué'.

milestones.name: Collaboration + long-running
milestones.description: Tree/fork, AI Attributes, research agent, team memory.
